title: Committee dissolution
doc_html:
§937.  Committee dissolution

The Joint Legislative Committee on Reorganization of the Executive Branch shall be deemed dissolved upon the adjournment sine die of the 1999 Regular Session of the Legislature.

Acts 1997, No. 1045, §1.
